ddls:
CREATE TABLE "service_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the service provider */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the service provider is located */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the service provider */,
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of service provided */,
  "operating_status" TEXT /* Operating status of the service provider (e.g., OPEN, LIMITED, PRIVATE) */,
  "area_served_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area served by the service provider */,
  "num_service_points" INTEGER /* Number of service points or branches for the provider */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the service provider was established */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the service provider's website */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the latest inspection report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_providers_area_served_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_served_id") REFERENCES areas_served ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_providers_service_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_type_id") REFERENCES service_types ("service_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_types" (
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service type */,
  "service_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the service type (e.g., Pharmacy, Community Health/Social Care) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the service type is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the service type information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas_served" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area served */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the area */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the area */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the area information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, service provider, user) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service provider being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES service_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service point */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service provider */,
  "point_name" TEXT /* Name of the service point */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the service point */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the service point */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the service point */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the service point */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the service point */,
  "is_open_on_weekends" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the service point is open on weekends */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the latest inspection report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_points_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES service_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service provider */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., report, manual, policy) */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the document is confidential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_documents_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES service_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service provider */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feedback has been addressed */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_feedback_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES service_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service provider */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user scheduling the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment (e.g., consultation, check-up) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_appointments_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES service_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_appointments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_utilization" (
  "utilization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utilization entry */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service provider */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user utilizing the service */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date the service was utilized */,
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service type */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service utilized */,
  "service_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the service utilized */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the service is recurring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utilization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_utilization_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES service_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_utilization_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_utilization_service_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_type_id") REFERENCES service_types ("service_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service provider */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the report is confidential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_reports_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES service_providers ("provider_id")
)
